text.title: Indirect Prompt Injection Defense Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the agent read content from sources the operator cannot fully vouch for (web fetch, email, RAG corpus, ticket comments, file upload)?

branch.question: Does any agent tool have write/send/charge/code-exec effect?
Is the runtime stack capable of structural input separation and dual-LLM split?

example.trace: agent reads zendesk tickets and can send email → consequential_tool=1 → runtime supports dual-llm → run-the-checklist
